body: Key files: docs/ECONOMIC_CONSTITUTION.md; docs/AUTOPOIETIC_COMPUTE_ECONOMY.md; _MODEL_TRINITY/AUTOPOIESIS_ECONOMICS_POLICY.md; _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CODEX_TRINITY_AUTOPOIESIS_ECONOMICS_PROMOTION_2026-06-13.md; schemas/*.schema.json; _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/economics/*. Verification already passed: economics unittest 5 OK, axiom floor True, full ai_chi suite 317 OK. Boundary preserved: no runtime automation changes, no MCP installs, no provider calls, no credentials, no ICP writes, no token/SNS launch.
constraints: Local docs/config review only; preserve bounded DAN; preserve Urbi judges, Orbi acts, MSigmaBUS gates; treat SigmaCredit as internal non-tradable accounting.
forbidden_actions: Do not install tools; do not mutate app configs; do not call providers; do not write to ICP; do not create token/SNS claims; do not change credentials or service permissions.
objective: Claude Auditor-Scribe review for Autopoiesis economics promotion
requested_output: Return an Auditor-Scribe critique or approval packet with concrete file/line concerns, remaining stop gates, and any wording changes needed before future runtime promotion.
summary: Codex promoted the Trinity Autopoiesis economics synthesis into local docs, schemas, policies, empty ledgers, and tests. Please audit for safety drift, token/SNS/legal wording risk, ICP boundary clarity, and Trinity role clarity.
